src: A sleek, gray modern car with sharp lines, sporty design, five-spoke black wheels, and prominent front grille. It has clear headlights and a low profile, giving it an aerodynamic appearance.
edit: A majestic, wooden medieval carriage with intricate carvings, featuring large, spoked wooden wheels. It has ornate gold accents and a classic emblem on the side panels, exuding an antique charm.

per_image_non_shared_src.martin-katler-1oS_1UT8fME-unsplash: The object is angled to the left on a concrete surface with sparse trees along the horizon and a clear sky above, creating a minimalist open space feel.
per_image_non_shared_src.martin-katler-3q8icPu_9Hk-unsplash: The object is seen head-on with an orange smoke effect surrounding the front, situated in an industrial area with machinery and a large ship in the background.
per_image_non_shared_src.martin-katler-3s5QlgKcTco-unsplash: The object is parked on a cobblestone street surrounded by historical buildings, with intricate architectural details and warm lighting casting soft shadows.
per_image_non_shared_src.martin-katler-94lAQc7ipNg-unsplash: The object is positioned on a leaf-covered path in a dense forest, surrounded by tall, bare trees with autumn foliage, bathed in warm, diffused sunlight.
per_image_non_shared_src.martin-katler-wVadpzciF-4-unsplash: The object sits in the foreground of a cobblestone street flanked by classical buildings, with soft, warm light illuminating the facade and casting gentle shadows across the street.

per_image_non_shared_edit.martin-katler-1oS_1UT8fME-unsplash: The object is angled to the left on a stone-paved area with medieval battlements and sparse trees, set against a clear, bright middle ages sky.
per_image_non_shared_edit.martin-katler-3q8icPu_9Hk-unsplash: The object is seen head-on with mist rising around the front, situated near a medieval dock with horse-drawn carts and a large wooden ship in the background.
per_image_non_shared_edit.martin-katler-3s5QlgKcTco-unsplash: The object is parked on a cobblestone street surrounded by medieval-style buildings, with stone walls and vintage wooden signs amidst soft middle ages street lighting.
per_image_non_shared_edit.martin-katler-94lAQc7ipNg-unsplash: The object is positioned on a dirt path in an enchanted forest, surrounded by tall, ancient trees with colorful leaves, lit by warm, ethereal middle ages sunlight.
per_image_non_shared_edit.martin-katler-wVadpzciF-4-unsplash: The object sits in the foreground of a cobblestone street flanked by medieval stone buildings, with warm sunlight illuminating the ancient facades and casting gentle shadows across the street.
